summary: Iteration 144: Email Template System - ALL 39 BACKEND CODE TESTS PASS. Verified: Dynamic email template generation based on conformity % (urgent <40%, warning 40-65%, normal >65%), editable email preview panel with proper data-testid attributes, and backend accepting custom subject/body for sending.

generateEmailTemplate_function.threshold_warning: PASS - conf >= 40 && conf < 65 triggers ATTENZIONE template
generateEmailTemplate_function.threshold_normal: PASS - conf >= 65 triggers normal template (no prefix)

email_body_content.urgent_art_2051: PASS - References Art. 2051 C.C. and 'Colpa Grave' for urgent cases
email_body_content.urgent_rischio_penale: PASS - Mentions 'Rischio Penale' for urgent cases
email_body_content.urgent_rischio_assicurativo: PASS - Mentions 'Rischio Assicurativo' for urgent cases
email_body_content.warning_art_2051: PASS - References Art. 2051 C.C. for warning cases
email_body_content.variant_prices: PASS - Includes variant A/B/C costo_stimato from analisi.varianti
email_body_content.variant_page_reference: PASS - 'A pagina ${variantPage}' references the variant section

email_preview_panel_testids.email-subject-input: PASS - data-testid present on subject Input
email_preview_panel_testids.email-body-input: PASS - data-testid present on body Textarea
email_preview_panel_testids.email-confirm-dialog: PASS - data-testid on preview panel Card

send_button_disabled_logic.prevents_empty_send: PASS - Button disabled when subject or body is empty

handleSendEmail_function.payload: PASS - Sends { subject: emailSubject, body: emailBody } in POST body

backend_invia_email_endpoint.saves_to_db: PASS - 'email_subject': subject saved to DB on success

frontend_loads.landing_page: PASS - Google OAuth login page loads correctly

critical_code_review_comments: SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 292-293: Clean conformity threshold logic (isUrgent < 40, isWarning 40-65)
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 296-297: Subject built with urgentTag prefix based on thresholds
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 300-306: Variant prices pulled from analisi.varianti[k].costo_stimato
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 315-334: Urgent template includes Art. 2051 C.C., Colpa Grave, Rischio Penale/Assicurativo
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 335-351: Warning template includes Art. 2051 C.C. reminder
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 352-365: Normal template (>65%) has no severe warnings
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Lines 379-382: handleSendEmail POSTs {subject, body} to /invia-email
SopralluogoWizardPage.js Line 1134: Send button disabled when subject or body empty
sopralluogo.py Lines 571-649: invia_perizia_email accepts payload dict with subject/body
sopralluogo.py Lines 622-628: Extracts subject/body from payload with .strip() and fallback defaults

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code structure verified - OAuth required for full UI interaction)

test_credentials: Google OAuth required for full UI testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - tests verify code structure only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 144 verifies the NEW EMAIL TEMPLATE SYSTEM: (1) Frontend generateEmailTemplate() creates dynamic templates based on conformity % thresholds: URGENTE (<40%), ATTENZIONE (40-65%), Normal (>65%), (2) Email preview panel has editable Subject/Body inputs with proper data-testid attributes, (3) 'Scarica PDF (Anteprima)' button allows reviewing PDF before sending, (4) Send button is disabled when subject/body empty, (5) Backend POST /invia-email accepts {subject, body} JSON payload and passes to email service, falling back to defaults if empty. All 39 code verification tests pass. The email service uses Resend API which requires valid API key for actual sending.

mocked_apis.note: Email sending via Resend requires API key. Tests verify code structure only - actual email delivery depends on Resend configuration.
